'''hayodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:niboshi|niboshi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niboshi|niboshi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hayodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyedeth|hæyedeth]] || [[word:hæyedej|hæyedej]] || [[word:hæyedesh|hæyedesh]] || [[word:hæyede|hæyede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayoyodoth|hayoyodoth]] || [[word:hayoyodoj|hayoyodoj]] || [[word:hayoyodosh|hayoyodosh]] || [[word:hayoyodo|hayoyodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayodoth|hayodoth]] || [[word:hayodoj|hayodoj]] || [[word:hayodosh|hayodosh]] || [[word:hayodo|hayodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayofdoth|hayofdoth]] || [[word:hayofdoj|hayofdoj]] || [[word:hayofdosh|hayofdosh]] || [[word:hayofdof|hayofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hayodotho|hayodotho]] || [[word:hayodojo|hayodojo]] || [[word:hayodosho|hayodosho]] || [[word:hayodoko|hayodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hayodoth|hayodoth]] || [[word:hayodoj|hayodoj]] || [[word:hayodosh|hayodosh]] || [[word:hayodo|hayodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hayodothol|hayodothol]] || [[word:hayodojol|hayodojol]] || [[word:hayodoshol|hayodoshol]] || [[word:hayodokol|hayodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hayodothotho|hayodothotho]] || [[word:hayodojojo|hayodojojo]] || [[word:hayodoshosho|hayodoshosho]] || [[word:hayodoko|hayodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hayodothon|hayodothon]] || [[word:hayodojon|hayodojon]] || [[word:hayodoshon|hayodoshon]] || [[word:hayodokon|hayodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hayodothoro|hayodothoro]] || [[word:hayodojoro|hayodojoro]] || [[word:hayodoshoro|hayodoshoro]] || [[word:hayodokoro|hayodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
